description: Fetch the crystal structure of the human SERT-paroxetine complex (PDB: 5I6X) from the RCSB Protein Data Bank. Isolate the central binding pocket by selecting all Chain A (SERT) residues that have at least one atom within 4.0 Angstroms of the paroxetine ligand (residue name PRX). Render a high-resolution, publication-quality figure showing the ligand as sticks nestled in the pocket residues (also as sticks, distinctly colored) and save it to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/sert_paroxetine.png. Write a structural analysis report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/sert_binding_report.txt containing the PDB ID (5I6X), the drug name (paroxetine), and a clear list of the identified interacting residue names/numbers (e.g., ASP98, TYR176).
